title: GitHub Review by gndrmnn
resolution_summary: All five review comments from gndrmnn were addressed. The `IsDatabaseReady` (and related `IsUserReady`/`IsGrantReady`) functions were refactored to delegate to `conditions.IsReady()` from the existing `internal/common/conditions` package instead of reimplementing condition checks. The entire `internal/common/normalize` package (9 files) was deleted and all Ensure* functions in `deployment.go` and `job.go` were switched to unconditional updates, with `job.go` adopting a PodSpecHash annotation strategy instead. `GetTLSSecret` in `tls.go` was changed to return `(certPEM []byte, keyPEM []byte, err error)` directly. `EnsureService` gained a `validateImmutableServiceFields` guard that hard-fails if the caller sets ClusterIP/ClusterIPs/IPFamilies to conflicting values. The `typed_simulators.go` file was deleted and its typed simulators merged into `simulators.go`. Beyond the directly-commented files, the normalize-removal pattern from comment 4 was also applied to `internal/common/job/job.go` (EnsureCronJob now always updates without normalization, RunJob uses PodSpecHash), and the conditions-reuse pattern from comment 1 was applied to `IsUserReady` and `IsGrantReady` in database.go. Test files were updated accordingly: `database_test.go`, `deployment_test.go`, `job_test.go`, `tls_test.go`, and `tls/integration_test.go`.
